Proton log spams this error message every 3 msec:
1447.456:0198:019c:fixme:vulkan:NtGdiDdDDIQueryAdapterInfo desc 0x1056490, type 48 semi-stub
1447.456:0198:019c:fixme:vulkan:NtGdiDdDDIQueryAdapterInfo desc 0x1056490, type 48 stub

I tried several versions of proton which all show the same behaviour.
I also tried the fix suggested by Vosinigr of placing driver dlls into a game folder, but that does not not help either.

Intel Mesa Intel Arc B580 (BMG G21)
notes:
Every other time I run the game, it hangs at EAC. The other times, it goes past EAC and presents a black screen with a cursor. Then it crashes and Unreal engine sends an automated error log. The relevant error (maybe) in the log Proton makes is:

3322.042:0118:011c:err:openxr:get_vulkan_extensions Error getting openxr_vulkan_instance_extensions, status 0x2.

I have tried many different versions of Proton, driver updates, Vulkan updates, and a few other fixes. Nothing works except for switching out my Intel Arc B580 GPU for an Nvidia 3080. Then, I still get hangs at EAC every other start of the game, but the successful ones will go into the game and it works great.


It seems this game may not be compatible with my Intel GPU on my system. Does anyone have any ideas?
